title: Job Opening Category Manager at Wrogn Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Wrogn Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Wrogn Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wrogn Advisory Limited:
Wrogn Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn Advisory Limited!
